title: The Rescue Force Regroups
description: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Franky, Sanji, Nami. The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where... Did you suddenly appear from?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Are all of the Escorting Marines down...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Careful, they use some really weird moves.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Has a great time to read a

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah... you must be... Rob Lucchi....

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: You have to master all six forms...

summary: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
